CHAPTER I

General provisions

Section 1

Article 1

Subject-matter and objectives

1. This Regulation lays down rules relating to the protection of natural persons.

2. This Regulation protects fundamental rights and freedoms as referred to in Article 6.

Article 2

Material scope

This Regulation applies to the processing of personal data wholly or partly by automated means.

CHAPTER II

Principles

Article 3

Territorial scope

This Regulation applies to the processing of personal data in the context of the activities of an establishment.
